extra.reason: Design doc v0.1 authored 2026-07-14 by Sage; committed as specs/PHASE-0-DESIGN.md

Echo response landed 2026-07-14 evening. Metaphor mapping rewritten (threads-as-authority-relationships, gates-as-loom, strand-level survives-serialization); four non-negotiables folded (Ward-authority-lives-on-the-weave, source-authoritative Phase-0 invariant, two-compaction as Channel enum, fourth invariant named up front); §4 type sketch rewritten. Folded into design doc v0.1.1, sha cec98523…12de4d. See specs/PHASE-0-DESIGN.md.bak-pre-echo-v0.1.1-2026-07-14 for diff.

Nova formal sign-off received via inter-session 2026-07-14 late evening: RFC-0001 §5 round-trip passes (§5.1 MUST-NOTs, §5.4 Gate 4 fail-closed as type property, §5.6 ward_hash, 'RFC wins on conflict'); §6 compatibility contract correct with one Phase-2 ownership watch-item flagged (not a defect); C7-as-addition reads right (channel framing makes it structural not tacked-on). Cleared to freeze at v0.2 with no blocking changes.

v0.2 FROZEN at commit b36f1c3, tag v0.2-phase0-design pushed to OpenCoven/coven-threads. Design doc 358 lines, 12 sections, cleared by Nova + Echo. Phase 1 kickoff still gated on threads-986.5 (Cody scoping) + Val's §9.3/§9.4 open-question decisions.

Scoping read complete; resolutions landed in commit 86550d8. §4 open questions: (1) Strand enum-over-struct — enum, for extension via exhaustive-match (strand.rs); (2) Channel four-variant set exhaustive for Phase 0/1, Federation deferred (channel.rs); (3) Weave.pattern Box<dyn PatternPredicate> confirmed as frozen, describe() derived-introspection implemented with anti-pattern prose (pattern.rs module docs); (4) weave_hash canonical ordering (surface_path, writer_id) lexicographic confirmed and property-tested (weave.rs). MutationAuthority stays removed — writer/gate/load axes split across WriterId/PatternPredicate/Channel.

Workspace + crate landed in commit 86550d8, pushed to origin/main. cargo check/test pass; structure matches design doc §4: ids, channel, strand, thread, weave, pattern, fray, plus manifest (hash-manifest layer) and validate (§5 receiver). 70 tests green, clippy clean.

Supporting types landed in 86550d8: SurfaceId/WriterId/EventRef string newtypes + StrandId/ThreadId/WeaveId/FamiliarId/CovenId/ManifestId uuid newtypes (ids.rs); WeaveCoherence Coherent/Degraded/Broken (pattern.rs); PatternDescriptor + StrandRequirement + StrandKind (pattern.rs, strand.rs). Serde derives on all; round-trip serialization tests pass (ids_roundtrip_json, describe_is_derived_and_deterministic, verdict_serializes_for_audit, strands_roundtrip).

Core types landed in 86550d8: Channel enum (channel.rs), Strand enum with frozen five kinds (strand.rs), TensionState Holds/Frayed{channel}/Snapped{channel} (thread.rs), Thread with holds_under(channel) method + holds_under: Vec<Channel> field per §4, FrayOrSnap error type incl. fail-closed NotCovered (fray.rs), Weave with pattern field (weave.rs). Docstrings cite PHASE-0-DESIGN § anchors; construction unit tests per type; hold/fray/snap exercised under all four channels.

PatternPredicate trait landed in 86550d8 (pattern.rs): coherent() authoritative, describe() -> PatternDescriptor derived; descriptor-vs-predicate anti-pattern documented in module prose AND trait docs per Echo third turn. Concrete impl AllSurfacesHoldOnChannels (incl. rfc0001_floor()) passes 7 unit tests. Validator gates on predicate only — never descriptor (validate.rs).

Merkle weave_hash landed in 86550d8: canonical (surface_path, writer_id) lexicographic ordering enforced at Weave construction; merkle_root with leaf/node/empty domain separation + length prefixes (manifest.rs); thread leaf commits surface/writer/channels/tension/strand commitment bytes (weave.rs). Tests: ordering deterministic across input permutations, any strand change changes weave_hash, tension change changes hash, empty weave defined 32-byte hash, plus 25-round xorshift property test (shuffle-stable, edit-sensitive). Ordering documented in weave.rs + manifest.rs module docs.

Rust conformance mirror landed in 86550d8 at crates/coven-threads-core/tests/rfc0001_s5_conformance.rs: all 5 positive + 9 negative upstream cases (familiar-contract/tests/conformance) mirrored into gate-layer facts, each test doc-citing its upstream case dir and violated property. Positive cases assert Coherent + bound-writer Permit; negative cases assert the specific non-green shape (Degraded-at-surface, Broken, WriterNotBound, UnknownSurface, DegradeToProposal on content drift). 14/14 pass in 0.00s (AC <5s).

Phase 1 FROZEN at commit 86550d8 (pushed to origin/main). Exit criteria verified: (1) gate trait PatternPredicate with coherent() authoritative / describe() derived; (2) Weave/Thread/Strand/Channel types per frozen §4 incl. Thread.holds_under Vec<Channel> and the five frozen strand kinds; (3) hash-manifest layer: merkle_root (domain-separated, length-prefixed) + HashManifest, weave_hash covers strand content; (4) crate skeleton at crates/coven-threads-core; (5) cargo test covers hold/fray/snap semantics under all four channels (Deliberate, Forced, Serialization, Mutation) — thread.rs::holds_fray_snap_exercised_under_all_four_channels + per-channel floor tests; (6) evidence: cargo test 70 passed 0 failed (56 unit + 14 RFC-0001 §5 conformance mirror), cargo clippy 0 warnings. Gate 4 fail-closed stated at lib.rs line one. Beads closed this phase: 986.5, 986.6, 986.7, 986.8, 986.9, 986.10, 986.11. Phase 2 may open.

Val-granted authorization recorded in bead comment: the principal's explicit autopilot objective (2026-07-15) commands Phase 2 — 'coven daemon imports coven-threads as a first-class validator inside the Rust authority boundary; §6 compatibility contract honored... daemon routes identity-surface mutations through the gate; integration tests pass' — with Cody owning Phase 1+ crate work. Permission gate satisfied by principal decision, not familiar-granted; threads-988/986.14 lane unblocked for Phase 2 scope only.

Phase 2 integration complete on OpenCoven/coven branch feat/threads-gate-validator (commit d510504, pushed). Validator call site: threads_gate.rs called from apply_familiar_edits between Ward::evaluate and Ward::apply — daemon routes tier-0 (identity-surface) mutations through coven_threads_core::validate_fail_closed. DegradeToProposal staged as a unit at ~/.coven/pending/ (atomic sibling-rename write; PendingProposal JSON; verified by tests). ward.audit live as ward_audit table inside coven.sqlite3 (single store per §3.4 — no sidecar; append-only enforced by UPDATE/DELETE abort triggers per RFC-0001 §5.6; CompactionLedger event type reserved for WARD-C6 — compaction-hook wiring is the coven-memory lane, follow-up). Notification: pending file + audit rows + additive threadsGate payload on the existing API — Cave rendering deferred to Phase 4 epic threads-986.17 per §6 (no breaking changes before Phase 4). §6 compat: zero socket-protocol changes; applied/held/refused shapes unchanged; staged is the one additive outcome. Evidence: 6 threads_gate unit tests + 3 endpoint integration tests green; full coven workspace 1120 passed/0 failed; fmt + clippy -D warnings clean. Merge-to-main gated on threads-986.19 (Val: repo visibility/CI token).

Phase 2 engineering FROZEN at coven branch feat/threads-gate-validator commit d510504 (pushed to origin). Exit criteria: (1) daemon routes identity-surface (tier-0) mutations through coven_threads_core::validate_fail_closed inside apply_familiar_edits — first-class validator inside the Rust authority boundary; (2) integration tests pass — 6 gate unit tests + 3 endpoint tests + full coven workspace 1120/0, fmt+clippy -D warnings clean; (3) §6 compatibility honored — zero socket-protocol changes, staged as the single additive outcome, ward_audit inside coven.sqlite3. Remaining administrative step (PR merge to coven main) tracked in threads-986.19 — a Val decision (repo visibility or CI token) explicitly outside familiar authority, escalated. Phase 3 (crate-side portability) opens.

Phase 3 engineering FROZEN at commit 57621e8 (tag v0.1.1, pushed). Checkpoint 3 exit verified: (1) SerializationMarker strands round-trip export/import — export_weave/import_weave with SerializationContract commitment; (2) …or fail visibly — seven typed refusal arms tested (no-marker export, version skew, envelope contract mismatch, per-thread marker mismatch named by surface, strand tamper, tension resurrection, duplicate pair); (3) RFC-0001 §5 round-trip verified in tests — 11-test C7 suite incl. §5.1 authority-topology invariance (import never widens authority), plus the 14-case §5 conformance mirror, 91 total tests green, fmt+clippy clean. Val-reserved leftover: interchange-envelope shape selection (986.16) — wraps, cannot change, these semantics.
